title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Calcutta. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
